title: StartServiceResponse
description: Response to a start service request, sent by the station to the app via BLE characteristic FFF4 (Notify). Confirms or rejects the service start.

result.description: Outcome of the start service request

sessionId.description: Local session identifier assigned by the station, present when result is Accepted

offlineTxId.description: Offline transaction identifier, present when result is Accepted

errorCode.description: Numeric error code, present when result is Rejected

errorText.description: Human-readable error description, present when result is Rejected
